title: FoxWorth Edition
description: It has a collection of mods, and resource packs that make the game more enjoyable, and exciting to play. A resource pack that I created has been made to change the menu to look more of the FoxWorth Edition Color's.
body:
![FoxWorth Edition Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f04584602f26be67164f35854978d86008adb66a.png) FoxWorth Edition is TravTube's special version of Minecraft. It's run with Fabric API, and the main mod is Essential. If you beat the dragon, the end poem is different, and there's LOORRREE! Coming soon! It has a collection of mods, and resource packs that make the game more enjoyable, and exciting to play. A resource pack that I created has been made to change the menu to look more of the FoxWorth Edition Color's. And with shaders, it can boost up the look and feel of the game.

_____________________________________________________

The Menu & Resources Pack Needed For this modpack is available as a mod, and/or a resource pack.

[FoxWorth Edition (Menu & Resources)](https://modrinth.com/mod/foxworth-edition-menu)
_____________________________________________________

The Mods I use in FoxWorth Edition are:

Architectury API by shedaniel 11.1.13+fabric

Carpet by altrisi 1.4.128

Cloth Config API by shedaniel 13.0.121+fabric

Collective by Serilum 1.20.4-7.36-fabric+forge+neo
